page: Microsoft Azure E112ias_v5 is an isolated virtual machine instance powered by the AMD EPYC 7763 processor. Operating on the x86_64 architecture under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance features 112 dedicated vCPUs derived from 56 physical cores with multithreading enabled. The processor runs at a clock speed of 3.525 GHz and includes 32 KB L1d cache, 0.5 MB L2 cache, and 32 MB L3 cache. It is equipped with 672.0 GB of system memory, yielding a ratio of 6.0 GB of RAM per vCPU. This instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, but it is compatible with Premium Storage.

In benchmark evaluations, the E112ias_v5 demonstrates strong multi-core capabilities. The stress-ng multi-core CPU test and the PassMark CPU score both rank in the top 10% tier, reflecting high parallel processing efficiency. Multi-threaded bzip3 decompression and PassMark memory tests also achieve top-tier performance. However, single-core performance is more moderate, with Geekbench single-core and text processing benchmarks placing in the middle 50% tier. Large-block uncached memory read and write speeds also fall within the average range, contrasting with the top-tier cached memory bandwidth.

The primary tradeoff of the E112ias_v5 is the complete absence of local storage, requiring reliance on external network-attached Premium Storage for data persistence. From a cost-efficiency perspective, the instance offers high resource density and dedicated CPU allocation, making it a viable option for workloads requiring isolated environments without the overhead of a bare-metal server. The hardware configuration and benchmark profile make this instance suitable for memory-intensive applications, relational databases, multi-threaded data processing, and medium-scale LLM inference tasks.
description: Microsoft Azure E112ias_v5 is an isolated virtual machine instance configured with 112 dedicated vCPUs and 672.0 GB of RAM, running on an AMD EPYC 7763 processor at 3.525 GHz. Utilizing the x86_64 architecture and Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance delivers top-tier multi-core CPU and memory performance, as evidenced by its top 10% ranking in PassMark CPU and stress-ng multi-core benchmarks. It lacks local storage and integrated GPUs, relying instead on external Premium Storage. While single-core processing and uncached memory bandwidth perform in the average tier, its massive memory capacity and high parallel processing capability make it highly efficient for memory-intensive enterprise workloads. The E112ias_v5 is best suited for large-scale databases, multi-threaded data decompression, and medium-parameter language model inference.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E112ias_v5 is an isolated virtual machine featuring 112 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs and 672 GB of RAM, delivering top-tier multi-core performance for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E112ias_v5 is an isolated instance with 112 AMD EPYC vCPUs and 672 GB RAM, optimized for memory-intensive database workloads.
tagline: An isolated, high-density memory instance featuring one hundred twelve dedicated AMD EPYC cores for demanding parallel computing and database workloads.

672.0 GB of system memory providing 6.0 GB per core
Top-tier multi-core CPU and memory benchmark performance
No bundled local storage, requiring external Premium Storage

Suited for large databases and multi-threaded data processing
